raw.summary: No SAST findings reported. However, the code has significant security issues: (1) user-supplied bio and full_name are injected directly into HTML without escaping, leading to stored XSS (CWE-79). (2) Passwords are stored in plaintext (CWE-312). (3) Cookie parsing can crash if no Cookie header is present (CWE-248). (4) No CSRF protection on /update_bio. (5) The role check uses a simple equality (user[3] == 'admin') which is safe from code injection but does not match the scenario's requirement for evaluating an expression from the database. In review_only mode, these are noted as out-of-scope suspicions; the security_score reflects the remaining risk from these issues.
